creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
``make -k fetch'' in a ports subdir doesn't keep processing on an error

Fix: 

???
How-To-Repeat: 
	I had only the tex, latex, and latex2e ports in ports/print/ and wanted to fetch the distfiles:

		relay:/usr/ports/print> make -k fetch
		===> a2ps
		cd: can't cd to /usr/ports/print/a2ps
		*** Error code 2 (continuing)
		relay:/usr/ports/print>
